allow: Bash(# Check if qemu is anywhere on the system find /usr/local /opt)

Bash(bash -c 'java -jar analytics-gateway/target/analytics-gateway-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar --server.port=0 > /tmp/gateway-test.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; sleep 12; kill $PID 2>/dev/null; wait $PID 2>/dev/null; grep -E ""\(Started|ERROR|Exception|Application|Netty|listening\)"" /tmp/gateway-test.log | head -10')

Bash(bash -c 'java -jar ad-click-service/target/ad-click-service-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar --server.port=0 --spring.flyway.enabled=false --spring.r2dbc.url=r2dbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/test --spring.kafka.bootstrap-servers=localhost:19092 > /tmp/adclick-test.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; sleep 15; kill $PID 2>/dev/null; wait $PID 2>/dev/null; grep -E ""\(Started|ERROR|Application|Netty|Failed\)"" /tmp/adclick-test.log | head -10')

Bash(bash -c 'java -jar ad-click-processor/target/ad-click-processor-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar --server.port=0 --spring.profiles.active=test > /tmp/processor-test.log 2>&1 & PID=$!; sleep 15; kill $PID 2>/dev/null; wait $PID 2>/dev/null; grep -E ""\(Started|ERROR|Application|Failed|Flink\)"" /tmp/processor-test.log | head -10')
Bash(while az group show --name ads-platform-dev-rg --query "properties.provisioningState" -o tsv)
Bash(for region in centralus northcentralus southcentralus westus3 canadacentral)
Bash(az eventhubs namespace authorization-rule keys list:*)
